metadata.tier_test_focus: Minimal single-agent probe for recognizing the rescue search and information sharing signal without extra branches.

entry_probe.name: Entry Probe
entry_probe.description: A compact start area that exposes the first rescue search and information sharing choice immediately.

axis_cell.name: Axis Cell
axis_cell.description: Small objective cell focused on rescue search and information sharing without extra branches.

scripts.lite_design_note: A small rescue: one clue object, one apprentice objective, and a short route where guide/support spacing matters.

achievements.title: Pico Axis Probe
achievements.description: Make progress in the pico Lost Apprentice variant while preserving the rescue search and information sharing signal.
